description: Replace the Runs tab inline under-table details card with a right-side drawer for quick run triage.
Keep run ID links navigating to the full-page run route for shareable deep investigation.
Add Previous and Next drawer navigation across the currently loaded Runs table rows.
Add an Open full page action in the drawer for the selected run.
Use WorkflowRunDetails as the canonical run inspector for drawer detail/action/log/audit content.
Refactor RunStudioShell so the full-page route composes studio-only graph context with the canonical run inspector instead of maintaining a separate detail system.
Preserve existing full-page graph/pipeline visualization for deep investigation.
Ensure all new drawer/navigation controls have unique kebab-case IDs.
